penalties.description: Video ends with a blank white screen before task completion is demonstrated.

consensus_score.reasoning: Claude correctly identified that the video cuts to a blank white screen at frame 22 without showing task completion. GPT-4o incorrectly scored this as a completed task. The incomplete_task penalty takes precedence over any other scoring considerations, resulting in zero points.

claude_value.description: Video ends with a blank white screen before task completion is demonstrated.

gpt_value.description: Suture placement deviated from one of the marked targets.

disagreements.rationale: Claude's observation that the video cuts to blank screen before completion is an automatic-zero condition that overrides any other penalties or scoring.
With incomplete_task penalty, exact timing becomes irrelevant as score is zero regardless.
Incomplete task results in automatic zero score per FLS rubric.
If video cuts to blank screen before completion, suture_cut phase could not have been properly demonstrated.
